text:
12-Zodiacal signs astronomically.
Astronomy and astrology are inter-related.
For example, when a baby is born at a time when Sun rays
are falling on Mars, the combined radiation being cast on earth,
characterises the native born at that time and at that part of the
earth with egoism, pride etc.
In the same manner, when Mars rays fall on Jupiter at the
native's birth time, the native will be of emotional type, over
confident and adamant. In case of Jupiter aspecting Mercury in
the natal chart, the native will be educated and fluent in speech.
Thus astronomical positions of the planets affects human beings
on earth. These principles are adopted in astrology. Astronomical
data is collected, adopted and interpreted for practical purposes
of predictions.
The author, has made practical applications on such
principles and brought out books, taking into consideration the
latitudes and longitudes and the planetary positions in the native's
birth chart.
IS ASTROLOGY USEFUL TO HUMAN BEINGS?
Yes.
